blended.narrative: Sugarloaf is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,570 ft. Looking ahead, 20 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: flurries, highs of 43°F, gusts to 43 mph.
Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 15°F. Expect powder.
